new_finding_this_run.detail: Three consecutive runs (May 20, May 21 22:11, May 21 23:06) have each found a rule that exists in bot/feedback/graduated_rules.json but is missing from bot/data/llm/graduated_rules.json. Root cause: two separate rule systems with no sync mechanism. feedback/ = trading strategy A/B gates. llm/ = LLM confidence adjustments. Rules graduate independently into each system. Structural gap: no atomic write protocol or consistency check between the two files.
new_finding_this_run.action: P1 dev: Add startup consistency check in bot/llm/graduated_rules_engine.py that cross-validates llm/graduated_rules.json against feedback/graduated_rules.json and alerts on sync drift. Also: audit remaining feedback rules for any that should be in the LLM engine.
new_finding_this_run.pattern: Three-run pattern: btc_trend_long_counter_v1 (May 20) → TOD_schema_bug (May 21 00:00) → tod_morning_edge_v1 (May 21 23:06). All same root cause.
